expectations.text: Recommends keeping yauth's OpenAPI spec separate from the app's spec
expectations.evidence: Line 3: 'Adding yauth does not require merging anything into your existing spec or pipeline'

expectations.text: Shows how to use @yackey-labs/yauth-client alongside the app's orval-generated client
Explains that credentials: include on fetch requests automatically carries the session cookie
expectations.evidence: Full mutator example with credentials: include

expectations.text: Does NOT suggest merging yauth routes into the app's openapi.json
Mentions that both clients coexist since yauth routes are under /api/auth
expectations.evidence: Line 7: 'yauth routes live under /api/auth. Your app routes live elsewhere'
